allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); build=d['projects']['new_app']['architect']['build']; print\('outputMode:', build.get\('options',{}\).get\('outputMode','not set'\)\); print\('builder:', build['builder']\); print\('server:', build.get\('options',{}\).get\('server','not set'\)\); print\('ssr:', build.get\('options',{}\).get\('ssr','not set'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./angular.json'\); const b=d.projects.new_app.architect.build; console.log\('builder:', b.builder\); console.log\('options outputMode:', b.options?.outputMode\); console.log\('options server:', b.options?.server\); console.log\('options ssr:', JSON.stringify\(b.options?.ssr\)\); console.log\('configurations:', Object.keys\(b.configurations||{}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./angular.json'\); const b=d.projects.new_app.architect.build; console.log\('prerender:', JSON.stringify\(b.options?.prerender\)\); console.log\('prod outputMode:', b.configurations?.production?.outputMode\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(d.scripts,null,2\)\); console.log\('@angular/ssr:', d.dependencies['@angular/ssr']\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./new_app/package.json'\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(d.scripts,null,2\)\); console.log\('@angular/ssr:', d.dependencies['@angular/ssr']\)")

hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists at graphify-out/graph.json. Use `graphify query graphify-out/graph.json <name>` to look up symbols instead of searching raw files."}}' || true
